goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0105 SCOPED 2026-05-31 (orchestrator). Implementer prompt at ai/tasks/task-0105.md. Branch impl/task-0105-webhook-verifier. PIVOT FROM ORIGINAL FRAMING: the previously sketched 'CLI auth/SDK consumer swap' (packages/cli/src/auth/**) is ALREADY ON MAIN — login.ts/whoami.ts/logout.ts already construct Sourceplane and have zero fetch(/v1//header-building. Swapping validation from client.organizations.list() to client.auth.getSession() would regress: CLI accepts API-key bearers (actorType=service_principal) but /v1/auth/session only resolves session-token bearers (actorType=user) per apps/identity-worker/src/services/auth.ts. That swap is a backend design question, not a single-PR consumer swap — defer. Per orchestrator's 'trust code reality over stale docs' rule, pivoted Task 0105 to next-highest-leverage human-independent candidate: B5 roadmap leg (specs/roadmap.md:81-82) — ship the @saas/webhook-verifier helper package. Pure external-consumer helper, zero coupling to internal workers, mirrors @saas/notifications-client zero-deps shape, signing scheme already locked in apps/webhooks-worker/src/delivery.ts:45 (HMAC-SHA256 over `${timestamp}.${body}`, header X-Webhook-Signature, prefix sha256=). New package packages/webhook-verifier/ (package.json with empty runtime deps, tsconfig, tsconfig.build, component.yaml mirroring packages/notifications-client/component.yaml structure, README ≤1.5KB, src/index.ts exporting verifyWebhookSignature + signWebhookPayload + header constants + DEFAULT_TOLERANCE_SECONDS=300, vitest suite ≥18 tests). Hard rules: WebCrypto only (zero node:* anywhere under packages/webhook-verifier/**); zero runtime dependencies (devDependencies only); constant-time signature comparison (no early return mid-byte-loop); case-insensitive header lookup for both Record and Headers inputs; component.yaml MANDATORY (workspace-package-component-yaml-audit pitfall); zero edits to apps/webhooks-worker/**, packages/sdk/**, packages/cli/**, packages/contracts/**, apps/web-console-next/**, tooling/**, tests/api-edge/**, kiox.lock. Acceptance: pnpm -r typecheck=0 (workspace count +1 vs main), pnpm -r --no-bail lint ≤45 warnings all in tests/api-edge, build/test green, kiox orun validate/plan/run dry-run select exactly 3 webhook-verifier Verify lanes, PR-CI 4/4 green via gh run view --log. Parallel-safe with sealed Task 0096f verifier (zero file overlap). Unlocks remainder of B5 (rotate UX, replay UI, failure-budget alerts) plus a future `sourceplane webhooks verify` CLI command. Real PR number required — TBD = blocked.

Task 0104 (Console U10 SDK refactor) ORIGINAL SCOPING 2026-05-31 (orchestrator). Implementer prompt at ai/tasks/task-0104.md. Branch impl/task-0104-console-u10-sdk-refactor.
